rows.label: xs33570100_MSG0010
rows.name:
If I knew this was going to happen,
I would have brought at least a bottle of booze with me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33570100_MSG0020
rows.name:
The location is terrible, but
right now I feel like even cheap liquor could get me drunk[ST:wide ]—

rows.label: xs33570100_MSG0030
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—Whoa, you're alive!
Hah! I figured as much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33570100_MSG0040
rows.name:
You went through a hell of an ordeal, but
you haven't broken yet, have you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33570100_MSG0050
rows.name:
Can't be helped, I'll tag along.
Pushing ourselves past our limits is part of the job, right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33570100_MSG0060
rows.name:
Let's go for a drink when we get back.
The one who contributes the least is paying.[ST:wait ]
